annotations.notesPlaceholder: Your own comments about this session…
annotations.editTooltip: Edit name & notes for this log
annotations.nameTooltip: Add a friendly name for this log
annotations.notesIndicatorTooltip: This log has notes — click to view/edit

openAnotherTooltip: Close the current log and return to the drop zone to open a different one
noLogHint: Drop a guide log into the Open log pane to begin.
languageTooltip: Switch the interface language. Astrophotography terms (RA, Dec, RMS, etc.) stay in English.
themeTooltip: Switch the visual theme. Trace colors (RA blue, Dec red, Mass yellow, SNR white) stay constant across all themes.
raDecColorTooltip: Swap the RA and Dec trace colors across all charts (except the periodogram).

calibrationTabs.calibrationResultsTooltip: PHD2's calibration plot and the derived rates / angles / orthogonality stats — same view that was the entire calibration pane before.
calibrationTabs.backlashAnalysisTooltip: Drop a paired PHD2 DEBUG log to extract the Dec-axis Backlash Test results. Reports backlash in pixels and milliseconds plus per-step diagnostics.

statsTabs.statsTooltip: Guiding error statistics: Total / RA / Dec RMS, peak and mean, plus the included / excluded frame counts.
statsTabs.imagingImpactTooltip: Estimate of how the RA/Dec guide-error asymmetry may elongate stars in the imaging scope after combining with seeing. Experimental.
statsTabs.polarAlignmentTooltip: Polar alignment error from declination drift — this section, or solved across all sections. Experimental.

sidebar.title: Logs & Sessions
sidebar.collapseTooltip: Collapse the left panel to give the chart the full window width. The recent logs and session list will be hidden until you expand it again.
sidebar.expandTooltip: Expand the left panel to show the open-log pane, recent logs, and session list.
sidebar.resizeTooltip: Drag to resize the sidebar. Double-click to reset to the default width.

dropZone.title: Drop PHD guide/debug log pair here
dropZone.tooltip: Drop a PHD2 guide log file here (parsed locally; nothing is uploaded). Tip: drag the guide log AND its PHD2_DebugLog together to enable double-click-to-open-debug-log.
dropZone.pickFileTooltip: Open the file picker to choose a PHD2 guide log (you can select its PHD2_DebugLog too).
dropZone.chooseLogsFolderTooltip: Pick your PHD2 logs folder; afterwards every guide log will be browsable from the sidebar
dropZone.browseAllByDate: Browse all your guide logs by date.

debugBadge.tooltip: A companion PHD2 debug log is available for this log — double-click a drift sample or open Backlash to use it.
